feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are working on Bolt Testing in SAP Cloud Tenant for the test script BEI Period End Closing – Plant. While doing the step (Schedule Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers), we have to create a new product costing job named “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” in “Schedule Product Costing Jobs” application and the job template “Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers” is not available in the list. we have attached the screenshot of the error.

Can you please help with this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dear Experts
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and needs to know what replaced tramsaction ME54N, We needs to know this app in SAP Hana Coud for our BPO be able to approve PR's on behalf of users who are unable to approve or did not set up substitutes. We have been using this transaction ME54N duiring time when we were still on SAP ECC.
Thanks
Gauta Makgopya

entry.title: planning versus budget enterprise project
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can somebody explain to me the difference between budget (BUDGET01) and planning (PLN). Both are possible for to upload an excel sheet, but for the budget I can create an item direct in the system. I want to understand the SAP logic. If I see it correctly the PLN is used for the POC calculation, so is my understanding correct that you have to update you ETC via an excel sheet in Enterprise Projects (project with revenue)

Thanks,

Best regards,

Rene

entry.title: Inter company payments in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can you please guide me on how intercompany payments work in S/4HANA Public Cloud with configuration guide. When you have 4 company codes, and one company (let's say Company A) is paying another companies (let's say Company C) investment activities. 

Thank you.

entry.title: IRN generation for B2C scenario from eDocument Cockpit
entry.content:
Why are eDocuments not created for the B2C scenarios in the eDocument Cockpit? How to generate IRN for the B2C scenarios?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Multi Plant Production
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Business Scenario: 

The company has 2 plants located in different geographical locations A and B. The same products are produced at both plants (both MTO and MTS scenarios are present), and dispatching is also done from both plants. However, the Sales orders are recorded at Plant A. MRP and Variant Configuration are to be used. 

Q: How do we manage and distribute the Production orders across these plants?  

Product: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402

Any help is greatly appreciated. 

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Synchronous Goods Receipt with automatic Warehouse Task Creation (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am looking for a way to do the Synchronous goods receipt posting in SAP Public Cloud and also use the Automatic Warehouse Task Creation when the Goods Receipt is Posted.

i know to use this App(image below)  for the Synchronous Goods Posting but i am unsure what to configure for the automatic warehouse task creation. But i don't know what o Configure in Configure your solution. 

 

 

 

I Set the automcatic WT Task creation to active in Maintain Storage types but it does not seem to change a thing.

entry.title: tax code filed mandatory in po screen
entry.content:
Hi team,

we have business requirement to make it tax code mandatory in manage purchase order or me21 screen please suggest the ways.

entry.title: Report for Actual WIP
entry.content: We have activate 3F0 and 33Q. After monthly closing, there has no report about actual WIP like COMLWIPDISP(Display WIP in actial value) in OP edition. Is there any workaround or will it release in near future.

entry.title: Use business user rather than communication user for CDS oData call in MS Excel
entry.content:
Hello community,

on this community page, there are some blogs dealing with the integration of API calls into MS Excel, e.g. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/s-4hana-cloud-integration-an-instructive-example/ba-p/13380764.

However, all of these tutorials use a communication user rather than a named business user (CB...). In our case, we want several business users to use this feature in MS Excel, however, the system has to deliver only data filtered on the individual authorizations/restrictions of each user (e.g. based on company code, sales org, ...).

Any idea on how to achieve this?

Thanks & regards

Wolfgang

entry.title: Sub-Order in SAP Asset Management Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear,

I am currently working in the implementation of SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management at a customer. One of the requests was to be able to create a sub-order for a maintenance order > the main maintenance order cannot be closed if the sub-order is not closed first. The thing is that we only have follow-on orders in this environment > there is no real relationship between the two orders, I can close the main or sub-order without any verification of the upper-lower level.

The sub-order is something very common and used in SAP PM but seems not to be integrated in the Cloud version.

Is there a way to create sub-orders in the Cloud version? Or should I use sub-operations? Even if I use sub-operations, I can close the MAIN operation whenever I want. Maybe I can play with user status and prevent and order from being TECO if the status is still in PCNF...

Thank you already for your help.

PS: nothing related to sub-order has been found in this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/7eeba4563f45cf4fe10000000a44147b.html?q=Manage%20Teams%20and%20Responsibilities

Dany R.

entry.title: Mapping Text ID to Forms - Report, App, CDS View
entry.content:
Dear SAP community, 

Is there an app, report or CDS View available to see the mapping of the Text ID of Header and Item to the Forms?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Special GL indicator for retention process
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to assign different special GL indicator for supplier's security deposit and retention procedures. For security deposit we have 'H' as special GL indicator but for retention there is no special GL indicator. In S4Hana public cloud as we cannot create any new special GL indictor. Kindly suggest how to resolve this.

entry.title: SAP S/4Hana Config Script List for Partners
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there an available configuration activities in CBC for SAP S/4hana Cloud Public Edition for Partners which we can download as well as some test cases? 

 

Thank You

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SOLMAN Setup/Configuration/LMDB

#

entry.title: How to Posing Manage Usage Decision with SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I'm attempting to generate Material Documents and Usage Decisions using EML, but I'm encountering issues when posting the quantities for "To Unrestricted Use" and "Return Inventory Posting."

Attached below are images showcasing my sample code and the result after execution. Could anyone offer guidance on how to resolve this problem?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Advanced variant configuration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using SAP Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC) in an implementation Project (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud).

We request the experts to help us on the following topics.

1. Report with product variants selected against each production order.

2. Make to Stock (MTS) process with Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC) other than Material variant process.

3. Stock report with product variants  (In stock overview Fiori app, product variants is not linked to stock in SAP Standard)

Please advise whether the solution is possible in SAP Standard or it has to be routed through customization.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Take Photo in Maintenance Apps on Microsoft Surface Go tablet
entry.content:
Hi we are implementing mobile devices for a project and want a seamless experience when creating Maintenance Requests and adding images on the run. With an iPad or Android device when choosing the Upload function it present with 3 options (this is across all browsers inc. Edge)

  • Photo Library
  • Take Photo or Video
  • Choose Files

When on a Microsoft device the Upload function automatically opens the file browser and the user will have to locate an image previously taken or minimise the browser, take a photo then return to the browser, locate image and upload. 

Wondering if anyone has successfully been able to make these options available on a Microsoft device?

Thanks

Higgo

entry.title: VAT code for vendor
entry.content:
What is the standard method to flag a vendor as NOT registered for VAT. How will this impact the purchase orders, Goods receipts and invoice amounts, as well as the VAT report.

We are in the South African template

entry.title: Start Conditions Workflow Code
entry.content:
I have a request for a custom start condition in the manage workflow. in the standard application there is "Total Amount in Company Code Currency >=",

then the custom request is "Total Amount in Company Code Currency <=". Can I open the standard code "Total Amount in Company Code Currency >=" to copy the code?

entry.title: What if users consume over FUE licensed in Production system ?
entry.content:
Now my customer have been go live since 01-Feb-2024. And now they have remaining 3 FUE left base on their license. My questions are as follows;

1. What if users consume over FUE licensed in Production system ?   Can new users who assign over FUE licensed able to log in and use in system ?

2. Can we setup single log on per user ID in case user share username and password to someone and log in system to use at the same time ?
